pragma solidity ^0.8.0;
contract C { address public owner; function setOwner(address n) external { owner=n; } }

pragma solidity ^0.8.0;
contract C { function kill() external { selfdestruct(payable(msg.sender)); } }

pragma solidity ^0.8.0;
contract C { address owner; function kill() external { require(msg.sender==owner); selfdestruct(payable(owner)); } }

pragma solidity ^0.8.0;
contract C { address owner; function auth() external view returns(bool){ return tx.origin==owner; } }

pragma solidity ^0.8.0;
contract C { event Seen(address); function log() external { emit Seen(tx.origin); } }

pragma solidity ^0.4.24;
contract C { mapping(address=>uint) b; function add(uint a) public { b[msg.sender]+=a; } }

pragma solidity ^0.8.0;
contract C { mapping(address=>uint) b; function add(uint a) public { b[msg.sender]+=a; } }

pragma solidity ^0.8.0;
contract C { mapping(address=>uint) b; function sub(uint a) public { unchecked { b[msg.sender]-=a; } } }

pragma solidity ^0.8.0;
contract C { function mul(uint a,uint x) public pure returns(uint){ return a*x; } }

pragma solidity ^0.8.0;
contract Lottery { function pick(uint n) public view returns(uint){ return uint(block.timestamp)%n; } }

pragma solidity ^0.8.0;
contract Vest { uint public unlockTime; function unlock() external view returns(bool){ return block.timestamp>=unlockTime; } }

pragma solidity ^0.8.0;
contract Sale { uint end; function buy() external payable { require(block.timestamp<=end,"ended"); } }

pragma solidity ^0.8.0;
contract C { address[] p; function winner() public view returns(address){ return p[block.timestamp%p.length]; } }

pragma solidity ^0.8.0;
contract C { function pay(address a) external { a.call{value:1 ether}(""); } }

pragma solidity ^0.8.0;
contract C { function pay(address a) external { (bool ok,)=a.call{value:1 ether}(""); require(ok,"fail"); } }

pragma solidity ^0.8.0;
contract C { function refund(address payable a,uint v) external { a.transfer(v); } }

pragma solidity ^0.8.0;
contract C { function exec(address t,bytes calldata d) external { t.delegatecall(d); } }

pragma solidity ^0.8.0;
contract C { function draw() public view returns(uint){ return uint(blockhash(block.number-1))%100; } }

pragma solidity ^0.8.0;
contract C { function roll() public view returns(uint){ return uint(keccak256(abi.encodePacked(block.timestamp,msg.sender)))%6; } }

pragma solidity ^0.8.0;
contract C { uint public startBlock; function record() external { startBlock=block.number; } }

pragma solidity ^0.8.0;
contract C { address[] public users; function payAll() external { for(uint i=0;i<users.length;i++){ payable(users[i]).transfer(1); } } }

pragma solidity ^0.8.0;
contract C { uint constant MAX=50; function batch(uint n) external pure { require(n<=MAX); for(uint i=0;i<n;i++){} } }

pragma solidity ^0.8.0;
contract C { mapping(address=>uint) credit; function claim() external { uint c=credit[msg.sender]; credit[msg.sender]=0; payable(msg.sender).transfer(c); } }

pragma solidity ^0.8.0;
contract C { bytes32 h; function solve(string calldata s) external { require(keccak256(bytes(s))==h); payable(msg.sender).transfer(1 ether); } }
